title: MIRA AdultEdge
description: MIRA (Memory-Imagination-Reason Architecture) is a judgment-bias diagnostic and coaching agent for adult learners, built on the author's original PSR theory of hypothetical judgment. It detects judgment biases in reasoning text using a 21-pattern registry, provides 3-axis diagnosis (metacognition, task definition, learning stage), and delivers differentiated coaching reinforced by cognitive-science anchors (ACT-R, dual-process theory, educational psychology). Code is MIT-licensed; knowledge content is CC BY 4.0; the Howstudy guide corpus (research/howstudy) is CC BY-NC 4.0 with additional permissions.
